title: [CODEREVIEW pass 3.2] variant yaml toolchain
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/elecrow_thinknode_m7_procpu.yaml:5 - Toolchain lists both zephyr and espressif; t_deck pattern uses only zephyr in variant yaml (espressif in board.yml). This is inconsistency. P4. Also supported list order does not exactly match t_deck (spi/i2c swapped, missing input/display). P4 style.
